creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am unable to synchronize my computers time using ntpdate(8) or ntpd(8).  
# sudo ntpdate 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org
11 Dec 09:51:58 ntpdate[40755]: no server suitable for synchronization found

And yet using the debug mode does not suggest anything is actually wrong:
# sudo ntpdate -d 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org
11 Dec 09:52:29 ntpdate[40757]: ntpdate 4.2.8p11-a (1)
